title: centaurea rupestris
intro: Centaurea rupestris, also known as Rock Centaury or Mountain Cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb that grows in rocky areas, typically found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Centaurea rupestris include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its health benefits.
